name: linSlFSMSetState
title: linSlFSMSetState
tables: Note This function does not have any effect in the event procedure on preStart. A Slave always starts in the 0 state.
void linSlFSMSetState(unsigned int slaveId, unsigned int stateId);
Switches the Slave with identifier slaveId to the state stateId.
slaveId Identifier of the relevant Slave. Corresponds to the slaveId, that was defined with linSlSimulate.
stateId Identifier of the relevant state of the Finite State Machine (FSM). Lies in the range that was defined by linSlFSMSetGlobal.
